context: Bitcoin and altcoins face mild pullback as the CLARITY Act gains momentum toward July 4 passage, with regulatory clarity supporting longer-term institutional adoption. XRP leverage flush signals capitulation while macro remains constructive; watch for stablecoin framework finalization to unlock next leg.

tickers.thesis: ICT Order Block structure intact at $79.5k support; micro HTF retest brewing into CLARITY Act passage catalyst. Expect liquidity raid below $80k to absorb stops before breakout into $85k+ resistance cluster.

setup.invalidation: Close below $78,500 weekly invalidates macro long bias

catalysts: CLARITY Act Senate markup finalized (expected late May)
July 4 target passage reduces regulatory overhang
Monthly close above $82k confirms higher-low structure
Spot ETF flows reaccelerate on headline confirmation
Stablecoin framework breakthrough unlocks DeFi collateral demand

tickers.thesis: ETH correction deeper than BTC suggests macro ETF rotation; DeFi sentiment fragile ahead of stablecoin framework. Watch for liquidity probe into $2,250 support before confirmation of higher-low structure.

setup.invalidation: Weekly close below $2,100 breaks longer-term uptrend; consider SHORT bias if breached

catalysts: DeFi collateral demand surge from stablecoin framework passage
Ethereum Shanghai upgrade effects on staking yield curves
Layer 2 scaling adoption (Arbitrum, Optimism volume growth)
Institutional DeFi flows respond to CLARITY Act clarity
Spot ETH ETF rebalancing into summer rally

tickers.thesis: XRP leverage flush (per CryptoSlate, May 3) signals exhaustion; CME OI reduction combined with price hold confirms institutional accumulation. CLARITY Act passage is directional catalyst for Ripple; OB structure intact for breakout.

setup.entry: $1.35–$1.38 (OTE on OB retest; 4h close confirmation post-leverage flush)
setup.invalidation: Weekly close below $1.28 suggests further capitulation; invalidates LONG bias

catalysts: CLARITY Act passage removes regulatory overhang for Ripple ODL (On-Demand Liquidity)
Stablecoin framework breakthrough enables cross-border payment settlement demand
Whale accumulation signal: 90M XRP moved to Coinbase (April 13 signal)
CME XRP OI recovery as shorts cover post-flush
Institutional DeFi platform adoption for XRP liquidity corridors
liq_above: Limit-order cascade into weekly resistance breaker

insights.title: CLARITY Act Momentum Reduces Regulatory Tail Risk
insights.body: White House targeting July 4 passage and stablecoin impasse breakthrough (per CoinDesk, May 6) removes major overhang. Expect institutional re-entry flows into all three majors as framework certainty increases; BTC and XRP likely biggest beneficiaries given regulatory clarity dependency.

insights.title: XRP Leverage Flush = Accumulation Signal
insights.body: CME OI reduction while price holds $1.35–$1.41 indicates smart-money buyers absorbing leveraged long liquidation. Combined with whale movement to Coinbase (Apr 13), setup mirrors classic capitulation pattern; OB retest into $1.58 is high-probability target.

insights.title: ETH Underperformance vs BTC: Macro Rotation or DeFi Anxiety?
insights.body: ETH -3.34% vs BTC -1.84% suggests institutional ETF rebalancing away from smart-contract risk pending stablecoin framework finalization. DeFi collateral demand unlocks post-CLARITY; watch $2.25 OB hold for confirmation of higher-low structure into summer.
